title: RC7219 GST/HST and QST Annual Information Return for Selected Listed Financial Institutions - Canada.ca
content:
## RC7219 GST/HST and QST Annual Information Return for Selected Listed Financial Institutions

## Business correspondence
Starting May 12, 2025, most business correspondence will only be available online in My Business Account, except when a business has changed its delivery method to receive paper mail. By providing an email address, you are registering your program account to receive email notifications from the CRA. These notifications will notify you when you have new mail to view in My Business Account. For more information, go to Online mail for business .
You can view this publication in:
Last update: 2024-01-12
Previous-year versions are also available.
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
